channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scoop: Rubio aide elevated to top White House national security role
item.description: Mike Needham, a longtime aide to Secretary of State Marco Rubio, has been promoted to a senior national security position in the White House, Axios has...

item.title: Bond market signals the end of the free lunch era
item.description: For most of this century, wealthy nations have enjoyed seemingly cost-free spending and tax cuts, but that era is ending.

item.title: A potential Iran deal could reshape global oil markets
item.description: As a U.S.-Iran deal possibly nears, the resulting oil market will differ from the pre-war landscape, with significant implications.

item.title: Behind the Curtain: Trump's irreversible choices
item.description: President Trump has expanded presidential power in unprecedented ways, but his specific decisions with that authority are what matter most.
